long_description:
NRE were alerted of link issues between bbr01.sr01.che01 ae12 <-> PP PP. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/17710
short_description: bbr02.sr01.che01 xe-2/1/0, ae12 & bbr01.sr01.che01 xe-2/1/0 | Private Peering Link Flap
